name: First Notes
description: Match 5 notes in your comfortable range. Listen to the reference tone, then sing it back. Take your time.

feedback.intro: You'll hear a tone. Try to match it with your voice — use 'aah' or 'ooh'. The green zone shows your target.
feedback.waiting: Listen to the tone, then sing it back...
feedback.complete: You matched {noteCount} notes with an average of {avg} cents off. {verdict}
feedback.tip: Don't worry about volume — focus on matching the pitch. Quiet and accurate beats loud and wild.
